reason: Confirmed product requirements, MVP scope, UX decisions, and implementation approach for JetBrains-style terminal splits.
Reference research for pane tree, per-pane tab bars, split normalization, drag ratios, and cross-pane tab drag patterns.
Frontend spec entry point for task implementation context.
React component structure and UI behavior guidance for splitting TerminalTabs into pane components.
Zustand state-management guidance for pane tree/session layout operations.
TypeScript modeling guidance for discriminated pane tree unions and strict state helpers.
Hook guidance for keyboard shortcut compatibility and xterm layout effects.
Reuse existing tab status visuals, DnD, menu, and splitter behavior instead of duplicating UI patterns.
